{{CargoRelic
|name=Gang Cadre
|class_id=20077
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a short wooden stick with a long history. There are many traces of insect bites on it. For some people, this stick is a symbol of status and power! In the days when info couldn't travel so fast, such objects were often used as tokens to prove the identity of the possessor!
|fame=15
|art=17
|fth=10
|civ=29
|tech=19
|ss1=Snail ATK +20
|ss2=Snail ATK +40
|ss3=Snail ATK +60
|ss4=Snail ATK +60
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br> (Awakened)
}}
